info.name: EASB - Jalan Saluran Ruang Lingkup Module API
info.description: API collection for Jalan Saluran Ruang Lingkup Module - managing ruang lingkup data for jalan and saluran projects.

item.name: Jalan Saluran Ruang Lingkup Management (ADMIN, SUPERADMIN)

header.description: JWT token for ADMIN or SUPERADMIN role

request.description:
Create a new Jalan Saluran Ruang Lingkup entry. Requires ADMIN or SUPERADMIN role.

**Fields:**
- `id_jenis_usulan` (number, required): ID of the jenis usulan
- `deskripsi_ruang_lingkup` (string, required): Description of the ruang lingkup

header.description: JWT token for ADMIN or SUPERADMIN role

request.description:
Update an existing Jalan Saluran Ruang Lingkup. Requires ADMIN or SUPERADMIN role.

**Fields:**
- `id` (number, required): ID of the ruang lingkup
- `id_jenis_usulan` (number, optional): ID of the jenis usulan
- `deskripsi_ruang_lingkup` (string, optional): Description of the ruang lingkup

header.description: JWT token for ADMIN or SUPERADMIN role

variable.description: ID of the ruang lingkup to delete

request.description:
Delete a Jalan Saluran Ruang Lingkup entry. Requires ADMIN or SUPERADMIN role.

**Path Parameters:**
- `id` (number, required): ID of the ruang lingkup to delete

item.description: Management operations for Jalan Saluran Ruang Lingkup

item.name: Jalan Saluran Ruang Lingkup Queries
Get All Jalan Saluran Ruang Lingkup (Paginated)

header.description: JWT token for OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role

request.description:
Get paginated list of Jalan Saluran Ruang Lingkup entries.

**Query Parameters:**
- `page` (number, optional): Page number
- `amount` (number, optional): Items per page

item.name: Get Jalan Saluran Ruang Lingkup By ID

header.description: JWT token for OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role

request.description:
Get detailed information for a specific Jalan Saluran Ruang Lingkup entry.

**Path Parameters:**
- `id` (number, required): ID of the ruang lingkup

item.description: Query endpoints for retrieving Jalan Saluran Ruang Lingkup information

variable.description: Base URL for the API server (includes API prefix)
JWT access token obtained from login
